changes.description: feat: add cancelButtonLabel prop to APICall for confirm dialog
feat: xmlui-search - spotlight mode, filter by categories, suggested keywords
Fix reactive expressions in component properties not updating when they call functions that depend on changed variables
Add pathname global
fix: responsive table glitch
Markdown in fenced code block should not replace "@{}"
Fixed a bug where setting the regex property to a valid regular expression also tested the input if it was empty.
Fix AppHeader theming
Fix responsive CSS generation
Fix tab-out issue with PasswordInput
expose a discoverRoute function which enables detecing the possible static and dynamic routes for an xmlui project
Ignore scrollStyle and showScrollerFade on mobile devices
Wire Inspector icon color through theme system so it responds to theme changes
Experiment with persisting unsubmitted Form data
Move Blog component from xmlui core to xmlui-docs-blocks extension package
Fix DataSource reactivity through variables
Improve component property name linting with responsive properties and behavior properties
Fix Select regression in Form (versus FormItem type="select")
Move Carousel to xmlui-website-blocks extension
Upgrade lodash-es from 4.17.21 to 4.17.23 to fix CVE-2025-13465 (moderate severity vulnerability).
Fix FormItem theme variable regression
Charts moved from xmlui core to the xmlui-recharts extension
Fix FormItem type="checkbox" regression
fix: JSDOM preventing running xmlui commands when bundled into executable file
List can handle row selection (similarly to Table)
fix error callback running on previous failed ApiCall after component mounts, as if the current call failed.
Add bootstrap-like column widths
Remove RealTimeAdapter component
Move Backdrop and Breakout to the xmlui-website-blocks extension
Add experimental local storage persistence
Retry patch release
Add TileGrid component — a responsive, virtualized tile grid
Fix Markdown xmlui-pg regression
Fix issues with mobile NavPanel
Add "spacing" to applyLayoutProperties
fix: Improve styling flexibility and theme handling across components
Implement scroll-snap related layout properties
Fix responsive width properties (e.g. width-md) not working on FlowLayout/HStack-wrap children
Add debounceWaitInMs property to ChangeListener
Initialize global variables of App before children are initialized
DataSource and APICall now return repsonse headers
Make transaction IDs optional to avoid CORS preflight failures with third-party APIs.
Fix NavGroup trigger alignment
fix: playground - theme handing
fix: wrapComponent - prevent layout props from being forwarded to native components unless explicitly declared in metadata

Upgrade react-router-dom from 6.26.2 to 6.30.3 to address -https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-9jcx-v3wj-wh4m (XSS via Open Redirects in @remix-run/router). axios was already upgraded to 1.13.5 to address https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-43fc-jf86-j433 (DoS via __proto__ key in mergeConfig).
Fix dependency regression with global variables
Add "strict" setting so lintSeverity
Implement responsive layout properties
improve: enhance wrapComponent functionality with metadata merging
Add `mockData` property to `DataSource` for development and testing
Add headerUserSelect and cellUserSelect properties to Table
Gather a search index into a json file at SSG time, which the client fetches.
Fix Table rows occasionally rendering as blank despite valid data by passing `itemSize={rowHeight}` to the virtua Virtualizer component
Add applyLayoutProperties configuration option
Fix ContextMenu and ModalDialog theming regressions
Theme variables optimization ready for review
Add dock property to Stack
Remove HoverCard and PositionedContainer
Fix Select regression
feat: integrate wrapComponent into core components where possible
Fix theme variable optimization regressions
Fix portal styling issues with ModalDialog and Search
Global variables regression fixes
fix: Links in tables can't be right-clicked
Allow sync between Table instance with syncWithVar
Made pattern validation such as email, phone and url more lenient: now they accept empty values.
Updated search functionality on website and reworked search data transformation. Also added categories for search results.
Add responsive `when-xs`, `when-sm`, `when-md`, `when-lg`, `when-xl`, `when-xxl` attributes
Fixed a bug where pressing enter after entering an input in the Search field on the website did not navigate to the first result.
fix: ensure header and data cells remain aligned during column resizing in Table component
Add responsive "when" (-xs, -sm, -md, ect.) attributes
Add the 'ssg' subcommand to xmlui
Add long text related properties to Link
Remove the EmojiSelector component

Fix `Actions.navigate` with relative paths (e.g. `'.'`) and query params now correctly stays on the current page instead of redirecting to the `Pages` fallback. The relative pathname is resolved to an absolute path before being passed to the router, because the wrapped navigate introduced in 12.4 for `willNavigate`/`didNavigate` events runs in a higher-level React context that lacked the nested route matches needed for correct relative-path resolution.
refactor: prevent auto-focus in Sheet component
refactor: update Link component to support noIndicator prop and improve footer layout on the website
Add StickySection component
Fix willNavigate and didNavigate regression
APICall now does not invalidate queries while navigating away
Remove deprecated \_meta.json files and related code. Navigation now uses navSections/ JSON files exclusively.
refactor: update layout and styling for navigation, introduce new theme vars for Drawer close button
Fix new operator parsing (priority) issue
ExpandableItem whitespace can be fully controlled via theme
Add Drawer component
